name: iris
description: Cross-tool context bridge between Claude Code and Codex. Logs your conversation and exposes it to the other tool so you can hand off plans, share context, and pick up where the other tool left off.

interface.shortDescription: Hand off context between Claude Code and Codex — no copy-paste required.
interface.longDescription: A thin context bridge between Claude Code and Codex. Hooks log your conversation to disk; the other tool reads it. Two skills per side — sync summarizes what the other tool has been doing, relay executes its last response as a plan. Symmetric, no shared protocol, no API: each side writes its own files and reads the other's. Useful when you plan in one tool and implement in the other, want a second opinion, or hit a usage limit and want the other tool to pick up.
